title: Theatre listing documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.
assessment.rationale: Supports documented assessment, suitability, investigations, consent and individualized care plan for theatre listing documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: Standard for Day Surgery/Procedure Service
source.population: Patients receiving planned day surgery or procedure services in DoH-licensed facilities, with age, risk, procedure, anesthesia, and discharge qualifications.
source.setting: DoH-licensed day surgery and procedure facilities in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: UAE-direct for service governance, assessment, care plans, pre/intra/post-procedure documentation, records, discharge, and patient education. It does not replace anesthesiologist judgment, facility policy, consent, credentialing, or emergency care.

exact_location.heading: Patient assessment and individualized care plan

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

assessment.text: Supports documenting identity, procedure, site, consent, fasting, preparation, medicines, allergy, and pre-procedure checks when assessed or completed.
assessment.rationale: Supports identity, procedure, site, consent, fasting, preparation, medicines and allergy checks for theatre listing documentation; no decision is generated.
